---
title: "Overview"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "overview")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Load data
data <- readRDS('dataset_large_12141obs.rds')

# Data summary
cat('Dataset loaded:', nrow(data), 'rows,', ncol(data), 'columns\n')

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
dashboardr::html_metric(value = "12,141", title = "Total number of surveys", icon = "ri:survey-line", color = NULL, bg_color = NULL, text_color = NULL, gradient = TRUE, gradient_intensity = 0.45, value_prefix = NULL, value_suffix = NULL, border_radius = NULL, subtitle = NULL, aria_label = NULL)
```

## How many surveys?


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Survey count per observer

```{r how-many-surveys}
# Survey count per observer
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data,
  title = "Survey count per observer",
  x_var = "Observer"
)

result
```


### Survey count per farm

```{r how-many-surveys-2}
# Survey count per farm
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data,
  title = "Survey count per farm",
  x_var = "Farm.name"
)

result
```


:::
